# Launch workspace brief

## Executive direction

Help operations leaders understand the launch workspace before inviting their teams.

## Product requirements

### R-01: Show launch ownership

The workspace must show the accountable owner for every active launch.

## Traceability rationale

Named requirements preserve the cross-team ownership decision while allowing the developer to choose implementation details.

## Product slices

### S-01: First outcome

Operations leaders can see the accountable owner for an active launch.

### S-02: Second outcome

Team members can confirm which launch needs their next action.
